positive: A whimsical, stylized constellation map interwoven with giant, bioluminescent tropical flora. The central composition features a stylized celestial body (a moon/planet) surrounded by deep indigo and teal nebulae, from which intricate vines, glowing leaves, and stylized starburst flowers emerge. The aesthetic is a modern, graphic art deco blend with natural elements, designed as a single, cohesive, high-contrast silhouette print. Utilize clean, thick lines and sharp edges, giving the print the look of a sophisticated screen print or linocut. Background should be a solid, deep midnight blue wash. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered on a repeating motif base for tiling or apparel placement. Lighting should be provided by the glowing elements themselves, creating strong, elegant highlights and deep, velvety shadows.
negative: photorealism, blurry, ugly, amateur, noise, grainy, watermark, signature, text, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, muted colors, grayscale, solid background texture
